name: Button
description: Accessible button with loading states that use flash-safe indicators (static dots instead of spinners when flash safety is enabled). Supports multiple variants and sizes with clear focus ring styling.

name: Input
description: Text input with required label, optional hint text, and clear error/success states with icons. Auto-generates accessible IDs and ARIA descriptions. Integrates with readability settings for font size and spacing.
usage_example: <Input label="Email" hint="We'll never share your email" />

name: Select
description: Dropdown select with structured option arrays, required labels, and error handling. Provides clear visual hierarchy and ARIA compliance with readability integration.

props.label: string (required)
props.options: Array<{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }>

name: Checkbox
description: Checkbox with always-visible label, indeterminate state support, and error display. Custom styled with readability-aware spacing.

name: Radio / RadioGroup
description: Radio button with group context management. Supports vertical and horizontal orientations with adaptive spacing. RadioGroup provides error handling and accessible labeling.
usage_example:
<RadioGroup name="size" label="Choose size" orientation="vertical">
  <Radio label="Small" value="sm" />
  <Radio label="Large" value="lg" />
</RadioGroup>

name: Card
description: Compound card component with Header, Body, and Footer sections. Supports interactive mode with keyboard navigation and motion-safe hover effects. Adaptive spacing based on cognitive load settings.

name: Dialog
description: Modal dialog with focus trap, escape key handling, and scroll lock. Uses motion-safe animations and adaptive sizing. Portal-based rendering ensures proper z-index management.
usage_example: Are you sure?

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible content sections that reduce cognitive load by hiding non-essential information. Supports single or multiple open panels. Context-based state management with motion-safe animations.

name: Tabs
description: Tabbed interface with full keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End). Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes. Context-based panel management with ARIA-compliant roles and states.
usage_example:
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1">
  <TabList>
    <Tab value="tab1">Overview</Tab>
    <Tab value="tab2">Details</Tab>
  </TabList>
  <TabPanel value="tab1">Overview content</TabPanel>
  <TabPanel value="tab2">Details content</TabPanel>
</Tabs>

name: Alert
description: Notification banner with semantic variants (info, success, warning, error). Uses ARIA role='alert' for screen readers. Supports dismissible mode with cognitive-load-aware styling and auto-icons per variant.
usage_example: <Alert variant="success" title="Saved!" closable>Your changes have been saved.</Alert>

name: Badge
description: Inline status indicator with semantic color variants and auto-generated colored dots. Lightweight visual cue that avoids animation or motion, suitable for status labeling.

name: Tooltip
description: Contextual help tooltip with configurable delay timing. Automatically disabled in minimal density mode to avoid information overload. Uses motion-safe animations for reveal/hide.
usage_example:
<Tooltip content="Click to save your progress" position="top">
  <Button>Save</Button>
</Tooltip>

name: Navigation
description: Semantic navigation component with consistent, predictable layout. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with keyboard navigation and active state styling. Adaptive spacing based on user preferences.
usage_example:
<Navigation label="Main menu" orientation="horizontal">
  <NavigationItem href="/" active>Home</NavigationItem>
  <NavigationItem href="/about">About</NavigationItem>
</Navigation>

name: Table
description: Compound table component with striped rows for visual row tracking, sticky headers for long lists, and sortable columns. Adaptive cell padding based on readability settings. ARIA-compliant sort indicators.

name: Toast (ToastProvider + Toaster + useToast)
description: Non-intrusive notification system with timing-aware durations (patient: 10s, normal: 5s, quick: 3s). Density-aware max visible toasts (minimal: 1, normal: 3). Supports silent mode, auto-dismiss with pause-on-hover, and action buttons. Motion-safe portal-based rendering.
usage_example:
const { toast } = useToast();
toast({ title: 'Saved', description: 'Your changes are saved.', variant: 'success' });
